process_fn: lambda df: df.assign(title=df['metadata'].apply(lambda x: x.get('title', '') if isinstance(x, dict) else ''))
lambda df: df.assign(author_name=df['metadata'].apply(lambda x: x.get('author', {}).get('name', '') if isinstance(x, dict) and isinstance(x.get('author'), dict) else ''))
lambda df: df.assign(author_email=df['metadata'].apply(lambda x: x.get('author', {}).get('email', '') if isinstance(x, dict) and isinstance(x.get('author'), dict) else ''))
lambda df: df.assign(tags=df['metadata'].apply(lambda x: x.get('tags', []) if isinstance(x, dict) else []))
